sentences.arabic: تَشْهَدُ الْمُدُنُ الْعَرَبِيَّةُ تَطَوُّرًا كَبِيرًا فِي مَجَالِ التِّقْنِيَّةِ الرَّقْمِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Arapski gradovi svjedoče velikom razvoju u oblasti digitalne tehnologije.
sentences.translationEn: Arab cities are witnessing a great development in the field of digital technology.

sentences.arabic: يَبْنِي الشَّبَابُ شَرِكَاتٍ نَاشِئَةً تَهْتَمُّ بِالِابْتِكَارِ وَالْإِبْدَاعِ.
sentences.translation: Mladi ljudi grade startup kompanije koje se bave inovacijama i kreativnošću.
sentences.translationEn: Young people are building startup companies interested in innovation and creativity.

sentences.arabic: تَدْعَمُ الْحُكُومَاتُ هَذِهِ الْمَشَارِيعَ لِتَحْسِينِ الِاقْتِصَادِ فِي الْمِنْطَقَةِ.
sentences.translation: Vlade podržavaju ove projekte kako bi poboljšale ekonomiju u regiji.
sentences.translationEn: Governments support these projects to improve the economy in the region.
